title: Security
subtitle: Configure anti-raid protection and server security settings.

antiRaid.title: Anti-Raid Protection
antiRaid.description: Enable automatic detection and response to coordinated raids, suspicious accounts, and destructive actions.

joinRate.title: Join Rate Detection
joinRate.description: Detect mass joins by monitoring the rate of new members joining.
joinRate.thresholdHint: Number of joins to trigger detection
joinRate.windowHint: Window in which joins are counted
joinRate.actionHint: Action to take on suspected raid members

accountAge.title: Account Age Filter
accountAge.description: Automatically action accounts that are younger than a minimum age. Set to 0 to disable.
accountAge.minAgeHint: 0 = disabled. Accounts younger than this will be actioned.

antiNuke.title: Anti-Nuke Protection
antiNuke.description: Detect mass channel/role deletions and quarantine the responsible user by removing all their roles.
antiNuke.thresholdHint: Number of deletions within 10 seconds to trigger quarantine

lockdown.title: Auto-Lockdown on Raid
lockdown.description: Automatically lock all channels when a raid is detected.
lockdown.whitelistedRolesHint: Members with these roles will be exempt from raid detection.
lockdown.logChannelPlaceholder: Channel ID for raid event logs...

events.title: Recent Raid Events
events.description: Timeline of detected raids, account age blocks, and lockdown events.
events.empty: No raid events recorded yet. Events will appear here when raid detection triggers.
